content:
Item 2.Properties
Our corporate headquarters are located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION]. As of [DATE_TIME], we owned and leased approximately 10 million square feet of office and building space for our corporate headquarters and in the surrounding areas, and approximately 90 acres of land to be developed to accommodate anticipated future growth.
In addition, we have offices in more than 80 cities across [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], and [LOCATION]. We also own 17 data centers globally.
We believe that our facilities are adequate for our current needs.
Item 3.
